title: Hats by Carrot
description: This resource pack will add the opportunity to get five hats from the wardrobe of the famous content maker PWGood.
body:
![Hats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7baaa0619dd66f3dc462499f28d47d2e3593b3c0_0.webp)
This resource pack will add the opportunity to get five hats from the wardrobe of the famous content maker PWGood. Hats can be obtained by renaming the carved pumpkin into one of the hat colors. For the resource pack to work correctly, optifine is required, special items are included in the game settings, and it is also recommended to turn off the headdress in the appearance tab.
## Names
1. **Yellow** - hat with a yellow stripe
2. **Blue** - hat with a blue stripe
3. **Green** - hat with a green stripe
4. **Gray** - hat with a gray stripe
5. **Pink** hat with a pink stripe
